data_sources.description: County-level pathogens found in I. pacificus and I. scapularis (Borrelia, Anaplasma, etc.)
data_sources.notes: Direct infection data for Lyme/anaplasmosis in Western ticks

data_sources.name: California Lyme & Tick Surveillance Story Map
data_sources.description: Interactive county-level Lyme incidence (2014–2024) + I. pacificus testing results (positives for Borrelia)
data_sources.notes: Best visual for CA — click counties for exact case counts and tick testing data

data_sources.name: Oregon Tickborne Disease Statistics & Maps
data_sources.description: Graphs and maps for Lyme, RMSF, relapsing fever, etc. (low local Lyme)
data_sources.notes: Shows how rare local Lyme is in OR

data_sources.name: Washington Tick Submission Dashboard
data_sources.description: Citizen-submitted ticks by species, county, year, host — excellent passive surveillance
data_sources.notes: Real-time-ish data from public submissions — great for WA layers

data_sources.name: Washington Alpha-gal Case Report (I. pacificus linked)
data_sources.description: 2025 documented AGS case from local Western blacklegged tick bite
data_sources.notes: Rare West Coast AGS evidence — good counterpoint data

generated_for: thisticksmeoff — California / Oregon / Washington deep dive
notes: One source in this dump was a duplicate (2026 Ixodes pacificus County Table — same URL as earlier Ixodes surveillance entry) and was filtered. The five sources above were newly integrated. Excellent material for Western US tick species and regional risk visualization.
